message:
chore(fixtures): add spec_reference to dlfcn_ops fixture

Adds an explicit `spec_reference` field to the dlfcn_ops conformance
fixture pointing at the POSIX definitions for dlopen, dlsym, dlclose,
and dlerror. Matches the metadata convention used by the other
`tests/conformance/fixtures/*.json` fixtures so the parity runner and
documentation generators can link back to the canonical spec.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
   "family": "dlfcn_ops",
   "captured_at": "2026-02-13T00:00:00Z",
   "description": "Mode-specific parity fixtures for dynamic linking operations (dlopen, dlsym, dlclose, dlerror). All GlibcCallThrough. Strict: host-glibc parity. Hardened: null handle safety.",
+  "spec_reference": "POSIX dlopen, dlsym, dlclose, dlerror",
   "cases": [
     {
       "name": "dlopen_self_strict",
